description_long: This is a small, rustic bread roll with an irregular, hand-formed shape and a slightly uneven surface. The crust is golden-brown in some areas, with darker, toasted spots and lighter, pale regions, suggesting a home-baked or artisanal style. The surface texture is rough and bumpy, with visible folds and creases, especially on one side where the dough appears to have been pinched or tucked. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The bread appears dense but soft, with a matte finish and a few small air pockets visible on the surface. Its compact size and lack of packaging suggest it could be found in a bakery, café, or as street food in an urban setting.
description: A small, rustic bread roll with a rough, golden-brown crust and an irregular, hand-formed shape. The surface is bumpy and matte, with no visible seeds or flour dusting.
description_view_0: This view shows the most textured side, with a prominent fold and darker, toasted areas on the crust.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a smoother, paler surface with fewer folds and a more rounded appearance.
description_view_2: The bread appears mostly pale and rounded from this side, with small, scattered brown spots and minimal surface texture.
description_view_3: This view reveals a mix of golden-brown and pale areas, with a visible crease and some roughness on the crust.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is irregular and rustic, with a rough, bumpy texture and some darker toasted spots. There are no visible scores, flour dusting, or seeds on the surface.
